metadata.description: Ray Fernando's collection of installable Skill files for AI coding agents.

plugins.name: running-bug-review-board
plugins.description: Real-user QA and Bug Review Board workflow for web and iOS/iPadOS app repos. Files P0/P1/P2 bug reports, produces YES/NO phase sign-off, generates an editorial HTML QA dashboard, syncs with confirmed issue trackers, and supports a separate Interactive BRB triage flow.

plugins.name: waves
plugins.description: WAVES (Workers, Aggregate, Verify, Extend): wave-based orchestration for Cursor. Decompose a big task into independent slices, fan them out to isolated parallel subagents with the Task tool (Multitask Mode) as a bounded wave, verify each handoff, then synthesize. Opt-in via /waves. For large research, analysis, audits, and codebase or data exploration. Formerly parallel-orchestrate.

plugins.name: waves-codex
plugins.description: WAVES (Workers, Aggregate, Verify, Extend): wave-based orchestration for Codex. Decompose into independent slices, spawn parallel Codex subagents (or spawn_agents_on_csv) as a bounded wave, verify evidence-backed handoffs, then synthesize. Tuned for Codex roles, config.toml limits, and codex exec fleets. Formerly parallel-orchestrate-codex.

plugins.name: bootstrap-ios
plugins.description: Meta-skill for iOS and macOS app agents: load the right Swift, SwiftUI, testing, data, build, simulator, and XcodeBuildMCP guidance before touching an Apple-platform repo.
